subcodes.first_line: The ascension of His Holiness Sadru's-Sudur to the Supreme Companion hath encompassed me with such grief as no words can convey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از صعود حضرت صدر الصدور برفیق نه چنان احزان احاطه نموده که ببیان آید
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
